title: Bathrooms
text: 1) Barrier-free suites of a hotel or motel shall be provided with a bathroom that a) conforms to Sentence 3.8.3.13.(1), b) has a mirror conforming to Sentence 3.8.3.16.(2), © His Majesty the King in Right of Canada, as represented by the National Research Council of Canada, 2025 © Sa Majesté le Roi du chef du Canada, représenté par le Conseil national de recherches du Canada, 2025 3.9.2.2. c) has a bathtub conforming to Article 3.8.3.18. or a shower conforming to Sentence 3.8.3.17.(1), and d) has a towel rack mounted not higher than 1 200 mm above the floor so as to be easily accessible by a person in a wheelchair.

title: Bathrooms
text: 1) Barrier-free suites of a hotel or motel shall be provided with a bathroom that a) conforms to Sentence 3.8.3.13.(1), b) has a mirror conforming to Sentence 3.8.3.16.(2), c) has a bathtub conforming to Article 3.8.3.18. or a shower conforming to Sentence 3.8.3.17.(1), and d) has a towel rack mounted not higher than 1 200 mm above the floor so as to be easily accessible by a person in a wheelchair.

title: Article 27.1
text: The roof structure of a building with a height of more than 3 floors and a height of more than 250 m2 shall, when the roof slope is less than 2 units vertically in 12 units horizontally (2:12) or 16.7%, be designed to receive a type 1 green roof in addition to the loads prescribed by the Code.

title: Article 14
section: CHAPTER II / SECTION II / SUBSECTION II

title: Article 23
text: These Regulations are amended by adding, after section 25, the following subsection and sections: "SECTION VII SUSTAINABLE CONSTRUCTION" 25.1. The roof structure of an uncombustible building of more than 3 floors in building height and more than 250 m2 shall, when the roof slope is less than 2 units vertically in 12 units on the horizontal (2:12) or 16.7%, be designed to receive a type 1 green roof in addition to the loads prescribed by the Code.
